items.raw_desc: Switch TP-Link SG5428XMPP, Omada: A switch is an active network unit connecting individual devices and other network elements. It is designed for coordinating network traffic. The TP-Link SG5428XMPP, Omada SDN is supposed to be installed in a rack. This model impresses with a switching capacity of 128 Gb/s. The Switch is equipped with 24 × RJ-45 ports that provide connection with network elements. 10/100/1000Base-T technology allows file transfer with a speed of up to 1000 Mbit/s. The switch dimensions are 440 × 330 × 44mm. QoS aka Quality of Service technology guarantees the switch stays within its capacity,  and it also enables you to control end station priority. The TP-Link device works with PoE technology, which provides power and signal connection to end devices with just one LAN cable. The weight of the switch is 4970g. The TP-Link SG5428XMPP, Omada SDN also operates on the ISO/OSI model network layer,  which means it can double as a router. Thanks to this neat feature, you won't need another network element.
